description: A portrait-format graphic built on a darkened booking-style portrait of an adult man with short dark hair. A FOX NEWS brand mark sits near the bottom, with white headline text below reading Spanberger receives DHS plea to hold illegal immigrant repeat offender now charged in attempted rape, with the last two words highlighted in red.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; Spanberger receives DHS plea to hold illegal immigrant repeat offender now charged in attempted rape
